---
id: open-webview
title: "Open a webview"
description: "Create a webview positioned in world space with optional VRM linking. The source can be a URL/path or inline HTML content."
sidebar_label: "Open a webview"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Open a webview"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/webviews"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a webview positioned in world space with optional VRM linking. The source can be a URL/path or inline HTML content.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
